series_metadata.series_description: These records contain fire permits issued to the public in protection areas granting permission to burn during fire season and all copies.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for three years after end of the fiscal year in which permit was issued, then destroy. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, paper copy can be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Retain for three years after end of the fiscal year in which permit was issued, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
